objections.description: Artifact is truncated mid-specification. The composition hierarchy ends abruptly at `</AppShell>` without closing tags, and no actual component implementations follow. The spec defines architecture but delivers zero executable code.
objections.suggested_fix: Complete the artifact with: (1) Full AppShell component implementation, (2) All 3 required screen implementations with actual JSX/hooks code, (3) Shared UI primitives (BottomSheet, Modal, DataView, etc.), (4) vite.config.js and web_server.py actual file contents, not just snippets.

objections.description: vite.config.js is described but never implemented. Performance budget enforcement via 'CI fails on exceed' has no actual mechanism—no rollup warning hook code, no CI script, no bundle size assertion logic.
objections.suggested_fix: Provide complete vite.config.js with build.rollupOptions.onWarn hook for bundle size warnings, and a scripts/check-bundle-size.js for CI enforcement that parses dist/assets/*.js and exits non-zero on budget violation.

objections.description: All components are file names in a directory tree—zero actual implementation code. Required deliverables explicitly include 'core layout shell' and 'at least 3 key screens' but none exist as runnable code.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement: (1) AppShell.jsx with responsive TabBar/SideRail, (2) DashboardScreen.jsx with SearchComposer + TopSearches + SearchExamples, (3) DocumentScreen.jsx with TimelineList, (4) ActionSheet.jsx with BottomSheet/Modal responsive pattern. Each must include hooks, styling, and accessibility attributes.

objections.description: Critical hooks are listed but not implemented: useDebounce (required for search input), useFocusManagement (required for accessibility), useMediaQuery (required for responsive BottomSheet/Modal switch), useReducedMotion (required for motion gating). Only useStaggerDelay is shown.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement all 5 hooks with full JSDoc, TypeScript-like param annotations, and actual logic. useReducedMotion must return boolean from matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'). useMediaQuery must accept breakpoint string and return boolean.

objections.description: StaticFiles cache headers for immutable assets are described but FastAPI StaticFiles doesn't set 'immutable' by default. The middleware approach is mentioned but not implemented.
objections.suggested_fix: Add actual middleware or custom StaticFiles subclass that sets 'Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable' for /assets/* routes. Show the complete web_server.py diff.

objections.description: Inline script references meta[name='theme-color'] that doesn't exist in the shown HTML. The script queries for it before the meta tag is declared.
objections.suggested_fix: Reorder: meta tag first, then script. Or remove the theme-color update from the inline script and handle it in ThemeProvider after React mounts. Show complete index.html <head> structure.

objections.description: API client is mentioned but not implemented. No error handling strategy, no request cancellation for autocomplete (critical for search UX), no retry logic for transient failures.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement api.js with: (1) AbortController support for cancellable requests, (2) Exponential backoff retry for 5xx errors, (3) Typed error classes (NetworkError, ApiError), (4) Request deduplication for autocomplete.

suggestions.description: Lighthouse CI assertions are mentioned but no lighthouserc.js or budget.json is provided. Add actual Lighthouse CI configuration file.
Hook hardcodes DELAY=40 and MAX=400 instead of reading from CSS custom properties. Consider using CSS variables via getComputedStyle for single source of truth, or document the duplication risk.

SVG icons are listed but not implemented. For performance, each should be a memoized React component with aria-hidden=true and currentColor for theming. Show at least SearchIcon and ChevronIcon implementations.
